svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="gwyfPVto3OYyjQZAuqhD"> <mxGraphModel dx="872" dy="473" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml MovieTicketBooking_StateDiagram_Booking

' ===== STYLE =====
skinparam stateBackgroundColor #E8F5E9
skinparam stateBorderColor #2E7D32
skinparam stateArrowColor #333333
skinparam stateFontSize 14

title Booking Status - State Diagram

[*] --> PENDING : createBooking()

state PENDING {
 state \"Seats: BLOCKED\" as PB
 state \"Payment: None\" as PP
 state \"Timer: 10 min\" as PT
}

PENDING --> CONFIRMED : confirmBooking()\n[Payment Success]
PENDING --> CANCELLED : cancelBooking()
PENDING --> EXPIRED : timeout (10 min)

state CONFIRMED {
 state \"Seats: BOOKED\" as CB
 state \"Payment: SUCCESS\" as CP
 state \"Ticket: Ready\" as CT
}

CONFIRMED --> CANCELLED : cancelBooking()\n[With Refund]

state CANCELLED {
 state \"Seats: AVAILABLE\" as CAB
 state \"Payment: REFUNDED\" as CAP
}

state EXPIRED {
 state \"Seats: AVAILABLE\" as EB
 state \"Auto-cleanup\" as EC
}

CANCELLED --> [*]
EXPIRED --> [*]

note right of PENDING : User has 10 minutes\nto complete payment

note right of CONFIRMED : Ticket can be\ndownloaded/printed

note right of CANCELLED : Refund processed\nwithin 5-7 days

@enduml

",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="6vH42XDeX_oHI80BPV8k-10"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="762" width="1047" x="160" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
